description: A vertical designed graphic (identical template to other USCIS-ICE analytics posters) with a dark navy-blue background featuring faint stylized 'data/tech' imagery - glowing binary digits (1s and 0s), abstract grid lines, bar-chart and circuit-like motifs, and small blue light particles - evoking advanced analytics and surveillance. In the upper-left corner is the campaign banner: a solid blue box with white serif text 'Making America Safe Again'. The central headline is large bold white sans-serif text: 'USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens'. Along the bottom are two official seals with white text labels - the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services seal and the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement seal, both with the DHS eagle emblem. The visual style is corporate-governmental and tech-forward. The propaganda technique frames inter-agency data sharing as a high-tech tool against 'criminal aliens', targeting the general public to convey efficiency and toughness on immigration enforcement. Designed agency graphic.
notable_text: Making America Safe Again. USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens.
